Author: Tiberius
Name: Glamour This
Punchline: A fast, filterable replacement for the Glamour Dresser and Armoire.
Description:
Glamour This replaces the in-game Glamour Dresser and Armoire workflow with a searchable, sortable overlay. Find armor and outfit sets instantly, spot duplicates at a glance, group pieces into their outfit glamour sets, and pull items in or out while standing at a dresser.

Main command: /glamthis (alias /gt).
